name: Christian Credit Counselors
description_short: Unable to verify — website is currently inaccessible due to Cloudflare security verification.
description_long: Christian Credit Counselors operates under the domain christiancreditcounselors.org and is currently categorized as a free-help provider. However, the website is not accessible for profile verification at this time — it is displaying a Cloudflare security challenge page without displaying actual company content, service offerings, certifications, or operational details. Without access to the live website content, contact information, staff credentials, service descriptions, pricing transparency, or organizational affiliations (such as NFCC certification, HUD approval, or non-profit status), a factual profile cannot be completed. The security verification page does not contain the necessary information to confirm whether the organization is a legitimate non-profit credit counseling agency, what specific services they provide, their geographic service area, or their credentials. To build an accurate profile, direct access to verifiable company information is required. Consumers interested in this organization should directly contact them to verify legitimacy before sharing personal financial information.
cons: Website currently inaccessible — cannot verify company legitimacy or credentials
No visible certifications, non-profit status, or HUD/NFCC affiliations displayed
No accessible contact information, service details, or pricing transparency available
Unable to confirm whether organization is operational or legitimate
Security barrier prevents independent verification of company claims
diagnosis: Profile cannot be completed due to website inaccessibility. Consumers should independently verify this organization's non-profit status, NFCC certification, HUD approval, and legitimate contact information before engaging. Do not provide personal financial information to any organization whose credentials cannot be verified.
